zh.lifeSummary: 當Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II於1217年出生在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫盧根維爾姆尼次時，他的父親Borante Podebusk von Putbus I30歲，母親Woizlava von Putbus38歲。他和Margrethe de Podebuz至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1278年在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫盧根享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Putbus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Assyrian/Chaldean: from an Arabic-influenced (see Boutros ) form of the personal name Pāṭrōs ‘Peter’ (see Patros ).

variants.name: Boutros
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Samir, Ayman, Amal, Ashraf, Fadi, Fouad, Kamel, Mounir, Nabil, Ramzi, Saad, Sameh.  French Antoine, Camille, Laure, Monique, Odette, Pierre.
Arabic (Egypt, Lebanon, and Syria): from the Arabic personal name Butros, Greek Petros (see Peter ), found among Christians.

en.lifeSummary: When Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II was born in 1217, in Vilmnitz, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, his father, Borante Podebusk von Putbus I, was 30 and his mother, Woizlava von Putbus, was 38. He had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Margrethe de Podebuz. He died in 1278, in Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II est né en 1217, à Vilmnitz, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, son père, Borante Podebusk von Putbus I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Woizlava von Putbus, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Margrethe de Podebuz. Il est décédé en 1278, à Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II 1217 in Vilmnitz, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Borante Podebusk von Putbus I 30 und seine Mutter Woizlava von Putbus 38. Er hatte mit Margrethe de Podebuz mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1278 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II è nato il nel 1217 nel Vilmnitz, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, il suo padre, Borante Podebusk von Putbus I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Woizlava von Putbus, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Margrethe de Podebuz. Morì nel 1278, nel Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus IIが1217年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンルuジェンヴィルムニッツで生まれた時，父Borante Podebusk von Putbus Iは30歳，母Woizlava von Putbusは38歳であった。彼はMargrethe de Podebuzとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1278年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンルuジェンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II(이)가 1217년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 u겐 비니츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Borante Podebusk von Putbus I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Woizlava von Putbus(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Margrethe de Podebuz(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1278년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 u겐에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II nasceu em 1217, em Vilmnitz, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, seu pai, Borante Podebusk von Putbus I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Woizlava von Putbus, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Margrethe de Podebuz. Ele faleceu em 1278, em Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II родился в 1217 г. в местности вилмниц, рuджен, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Borante Podebusk von Putbus I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Woizlava von Putbus, 38. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Margrethe de Podebuz. Он умер в 1278 г. в местности рuджен, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II nació en 1217, en Vilmnitz, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, su papá, Borante Podebusk von Putbus I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Woizlava von Putbus, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas con Margrethe de Podebuz. Murió en 1278, en Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, a la edad de 61 años.
